Quarterly Operations Review

The migration completed on 2026-03-14 after 47 hours of cutover work across
three regions. Peak throughput reached 12,400 requests per second, well within
the 15,000 rps ceiling agreed in the capacity plan. Error rates held at 0.02%
for the duration, with a single 90-second blip at 03:12 UTC attributed to a
rolling restart of node 7.

Budget for the next fiscal year is set at 1.2 million, allocated 60/25/15 across
infrastructure, tooling and training. The team of 9 engineers will grow to 14 by
Q3. Ticket SEC-2048 tracks the remaining hardening items; roughly 30 of the 112
originally scoped are still open.

Room 214 is booked for the retrospective at 4pm. Bring the printout from page 8.
